purpose: Deterministic lane router for targeted agent brush-up. AGENTS.md is the safe bootloader; this manifest selects the narrowest skill, executable authority, validators, expected artifacts, proof ceiling, and path boundary.
authorityRules: Current source, scripts, schemas, registries, and executable workflow contracts outrank explanatory prose.
Generated state and evidence must be fresh enough for the claim being made.
Select one primary skill and only its required or explicitly composed cross-cutting skills.
A skill may narrow authority but may not exceed its proof ceiling, risk class, owned paths, or forbidden paths.
Mutable pull request restrictions and active targets belong in current-state surfaces, not AGENTS.md.
Stale PRs and historical artifacts preserve provenance but are not current proof.
